title: Radha Chalisa
intro: Shri Radha Chalisa - Hymn to Goddess Radha
description:
॥ Shri Radha Chalisa ॥

॥ Doha ॥

Shri Radhe Vrishabhanuja, bhaktani pranadhar.
Vrindavipin viharini, pranavaun barambar.
Jaisau taisau ravarau, Krishna priya sukhdham.
Charan sharan nij deejai, sundar sukhad lalam.

॥ Chaupai ॥

Jai Vrishabhanu kunvari Shri Shyama.
Keerati nandini shobha dhama.
Nitya viharini Shyam adhara.
Amit mod mangal datara.
Raas vilasini ras vistarini.
Sahachari subhag youth man bhavani.
Nitya kishori Radha gori.
Shyam pran-dhan ati jiy bhori.
Karuna sagar hiy umangini.
Lalitadik sakhiyan ki sangini.
Din kar kanya kool viharini.
Krishna pran priya hiy hulsavani.
Nitya Shyam tumarau gun gavain.
Radha Radha kahi harshavain.
Murli mein nit naam ucharain.
Tuv karan leela vapu dharain.
Prem swaroopini ati sukumari.
Shyam priya Vrishabhanu dulari.
Naval kishori ati chhavi dhama.
Dyuti laghu lagai koti rati kama.
Gaurangi shashi nindak badana.
Subhag chapal aniyare nayana.
Javak yut yug pankaj charana.
Nupur dhuni preetam man harana.
Santat sahachari seva karahin.
Maha mod mangal man bharahin.
Rasikan jeevan pran adhara.
Radha naam sakal sukh sara.
Agam agochar nitya swaroopa.
Dhyan dharat nishidin Braj bhoopa.
Upajeu jasu ansh gun khani.
Kotin Uma Rama Brahmani.
Nitya dham Golok viharini.
Jan rakshak dukh dosh nasavani.
Shiv Aja muni sanakadik Narad.
Paar na pain Shesh aru Sharad.
Radha shubh gun roop ujari.
Nirakhi prasann hot Banbari.
Braj jeevan dhan Radha Rani.
Mahima amit na jaay bakhani.
Preetam sang dei galbahi.
Biharat nit Vrindavan manhi.
Radha Krishna Krishna kahain Radha.
Ek roop dau preeti agadha.
Shri Radha Mohan man harani.
Jan sukh dayak praphulit badani.
Kotik roop dharain Nand Nanda.
Darsh karan hit Gokul chanda.
Raas keli kari tumhein rijhavain.
Maan karau jab ati duhkh pavain.
Praphulit hot darsh jab pavain.
Vividh bhanti nit vinay sunavain.
Vrindaranya viharini Shyama.
Naam let pooran sab kama.
Kotin yagya tapashya karahu.
Vividh nem vrat hiy mein dharahu.
Tau na Shyam bhaktahin apanavain.
Jab lagi Radha naam na gavain.
Vrindavipin swamini Radha.
Leela vapu tab amit agadha.
Swayam Krishna pavain nahin para.
Aur tumhein ko janan hara.
Shri Radha ras preeti abheda.
Saadar gaan karat nit Veda.
Radha tyagi Krishna ko bhajihain.
Te sapanehu jag jaladhi na tari hain.
Keerati kunvari ladili Radha.
Sumirat sakal mitahi bhavabadha.
Naam amangal mool nasavan.
Trividh taap har Hari manbhavan.
Radha naam lei jo koi.
Sahajahi Damodar bas hoi.
Radha naam param sukhdayi.
Bhajatahin kripa karahi Yadurai.
Yashumati nandan peechhe phirihain.
Jo kou Radha naam sumirihain.
Raas viharini Shyama pyari.
Karahu kripa Barsane wari.
Vrindavan hai sharan tihari.
Jai jai jai Vrishabhanu dulari.

॥ Doha ॥

Shri Radha Sarveshwari, Rasikeshwar Ghanshyam.
Karahun nirantar baas main, Shri Vrindavan Dham.
meaning:
॥ Shri Radha Chalisa ॥

॥ Doha ॥

Shri Radhe Vrishabhanuja, bhaktani pranadhar.
O Radhe, daughter of Vrishabhanu, you are the life-support of your devotees.
Vrindavipin viharini, pranavaun barambar.
O wanderer of the groves of Vrindavan, I bow to you again and again.
Jaisau taisau ravarau, Krishna priya sukhdham.
However you are, O beloved of Krishna and abode of happiness, please accept me.
Charan sharan nij deejai, sundar sukhad lalam.
Grant me refuge at your lotus feet, O beautiful and blissful one.

॥ Chaupai ॥

Jai Vrishabhanu kunvari Shri Shyama.
Victory to the daughter of Vrishabhanu, Shri Shyama.
Keerati nandini shobha dhama.
Daughter of Keerti, you are the abode of beauty.
Nitya viharini Shyam adhara.
You are the eternal wanderer and the foundation of Shyam.
Amit mod mangal datara.
You are the giver of immense joy and auspiciousness.
Raas vilasini ras vistarini.
You are the one who delights in the Raas and expands the divine nectar.
Sahachari subhag youth man bhavani.
You are loved by the beautiful group of your companions (Sakhis).
Nitya kishori Radha gori.
O eternally youthful, fair-complexioned Radha.
Shyam pran-dhan ati jiy bhori.
You are the treasure of Shyam's life and very simple-hearted.
Karuna sagar hiy umangini.
You are the ocean of compassion and one who fills the heart with ecstasy.
Lalitadik sakhiyan ki sangini.
You are the constant companion of Lalita and other Sakhis.
Din kar kanya kool viharini.
You wander on the banks of the daughter of the Sun (the Yamuna river).
Krishna pran priya hiy hulsavani.
You are Krishna's beloved and the one who delights his heart.
Nitya Shyam tumarau gun gavain.
Eternally, Shyam sings your praises.
Radha Radha kahi harshavain.
He rejoices by chanting "Radha, Radha."
Murli mein nit naam ucharain.
He constantly utters your name in his flute.
Tuv karan leela vapu dharain.
He takes on his divine form only for your sake.
Prem swaroopini ati sukumari.
You are the embodiment of love and very delicate.
Shyam priya Vrishabhanu dulari.
O beloved of Shyam, daughter of Vrishabhanu.
Naval kishori ati chhavi dhama.
O eternally young girl, you are the abode of extreme beauty.
Dyuti laghu lagai koti rati kama.
Before your glow, even millions of Rati and Kamadeva seem insignificant.
Gaurangi shashi nindak badana.
You have a golden complexion, and your face puts the moon to shame.
Subhag chapal aniyare nayana.
You have beautiful, restless, and sharp eyes.
Javak yut yug pankaj charana.
Your lotus-like feet are adorned with red dye (Javak).
Nupur dhuni preetam man harana.
The sound of your anklets steals the heart of your beloved.
Santat sahachari seva karahin.
Your companions constantly serve you.
Maha mod mangal man bharahin.
They fill their hearts with great joy and auspiciousness.
Rasikan jeevan pran adhara.
You are the life and breath of the true connoisseurs of love (Rasikas).
Radha naam sakal sukh sara.
The name "Radha" is the essence of all happiness.
Agam agochar nitya swaroopa.
You are beyond reach, beyond perception, and eternally existent.
Dhyan dharat nishidin Braj bhoopa.
The King of Braj (Krishna) meditates on you day and night.
Upajeu jasu ansh gun khani.
From a fraction of your essence were born the mines of virtue.
Kotin Uma Rama Brahmani.
Millions of goddesses like Uma, Rama, and Brahmani.
Nitya dham Golok viharini.
You wander eternally in the abode of Goloka.
Jan rakshak dukh dosh nasavani.
You are the protector of devotees and the destroyer of miseries and faults.
Shiv Aja muni sanakadik Narad.
Shiva, Brahma, the sages, Sanak and his brothers, and Narada.
Paar na pain Shesh aru Sharad.
Even Sheshnaag and Saraswati cannot fathom your depths.
Radha shubh gun roop ujari.
Radha's auspicious virtues and beauty are brilliant.
Nirakhi prasann hot Banbari.
Seeing them, Banbari (Krishna) becomes pleased.
Braj jeevan dhan Radha Rani.
Radha Rani is the life-wealth of Braj.
Mahima amit na jaay bakhani.
Your greatness is infinite and cannot be described.
Preetam sang dei galbahi.
With your arms around your beloved's neck.
Biharat nit Vrindavan manhi.
You wander eternally in Vrindavan.
Radha Krishna Krishna kahain Radha.
Radha is Krishna, and Krishna is Radha.
Ek roop dau preeti agadha.
They are one form, and their love is fathomless.
Shri Radha Mohan man harani.
Shri Radha steals the heart of Mohan (Krishna).
Jan sukh dayak praphulit badani.
You are the giver of joy to devotees and have a blooming face.
Kotik roop dharain Nand Nanda.
Nand Nanda (Krishna) takes millions of forms.
Darsh karan hit Gokul chanda.
Just to have a glimpse of you, O Moon of Gokul.
Raas keli kari tumhein rijhavain.
He pleases you by performing Raas-Leela.
Maan karau jab ati duhkh pavain.
When you act coy (Maan), he becomes very distressed.
Praphulit hot darsh jab pavain.
He becomes joyful when he catches a glimpse of you.
Vividh bhanti nit vinay sunavain.
He offers prayers to you in various ways daily.
Vrindaranya viharini Shyama.
O Shyama, who wanders in the forest of Vrinda.
Naam let pooran sab kama.
Taking your name fulfills all desires.
Kotin yagya tapashya karahu.
You may perform millions of sacrifices and penances.
Vividh nem vrat hiy mein dharahu.
You may hold various vows and observances in your heart.
Tau na Shyam bhaktahin apanavain.
Even then, Shyam does not accept the devotee.
Jab lagi Radha naam na gavain.
As long as they do not sing the name of Radha.
Vrindavipin swamini Radha.
Radha is the mistress of the Vrinda forest.
Leela vapu tab amit agadha.
Your divine form is infinite and fathomless.
Swayam Krishna pavain nahin para.
Even Krishna himself cannot fathom your extent.
Aur tumhein ko janan hara.
And who else can truly know you?
Shri Radha ras preeti abheda.
There is no difference between Shri Radha's nectar and love.
Saadar gaan karat nit Veda.
The Vedas eternally sing their praises with reverence.
Radha tyagi Krishna ko bhajihain.
Those who worship Krishna by abandoning Radha.
Te sapanehu jag jaladhi na tari hain.
They will not cross the ocean of existence even in their dreams.
Keerati kunvari ladili Radha.
Radha is the beloved daughter of Keerti.
Sumirat sakal mitahi bhavabadha.
Remembering her destroys all worldly obstacles.
Naam amangal mool nasavan.
Your name is the destroyer of the root of all inauspiciousness.
Trividh taap har Hari manbhavan.
It destroys the three kinds of miseries and is dear to Hari.
Radha naam lei jo koi.
Whoever chants the name of Radha.
Sahajahi Damodar bas hoi.
Damodar (Krishna) naturally comes under their control.
Radha naam param sukhdayi.
The name Radha gives supreme happiness.
Bhajatahin kripa karahi Yadurai.
Yadurai (Krishna) showers his grace upon those who worship her.
Yashumati nandan peechhe phirihain.
Yashumati's son will follow those.
Jo kou Radha naam sumirihain.
Who remember the name of Radha.
Raas viharini Shyama pyari.
O beloved Shyama, who performs Raas.
Karahu kripa Barsane wari.
O Lady of Barsana, please shower your grace.
Vrindavan hai sharan tihari.
All of Vrindavan is in your refuge.
Jai jai jai Vrishabhanu dulari.
Victory, victory, victory to the daughter of Vrishabhanu.

॥ Doha ॥

Shri Radha Sarveshwari, Rasikeshwar Ghanshyam.
Shri Radha is the Goddess of all, and Rasikeshwar (Lord of connoisseurs) is Ghanshyam.
Karahun nirantar baas main, Shri Vrindavan Dham.
May I reside eternally in the divine abode of Shri Vrindavan.

faq.q1: What is the primary purpose of reciting the Radha Chalisa?
faq.a1: The primary purpose of reciting the Radha Chalisa is to seek Bhakti (devotion) and Prema (divine love). Radha Rani is considered the embodiment of devotion itself. Reciting this hymn helps dissolve ego and awakens pure, selfless love for Lord Krishna in the heart of the devotee.
faq.q2: What are the benefits of reciting the Radha Chalisa?
faq.a2: Reciting the Radha Chalisa is considered highly effective for gaining the grace of Radha Rani. Key benefits include: Mental Peace: It calms the mind and helps alleviate worldly anxieties. Krishna’s Grace: It is believed that the path to Lord Krishna is through Radha Rani. Pleasing her by reciting the Chalisa makes attaining Krishna’s grace much easier. Humility: It cultivates a spirit of service, humbleness, and sweetness in one’s nature. Spiritual Growth: It guides the seeker away from materialistic desires and helps them progress on the path of pure devotion.
faq.q3: Are there any specific rituals required to recite the Radha Chalisa?
faq.a3: In the path of Radha-Bhakti, Bhav (deep feeling) is more important than rituals. Radha Rani loves simplicity and sincerity. You can recite it in any clean place with a calm mind. There are no rigid rules; the only requirement is that your heart should be fully immersed in her remembrance.
faq.q4: Should one recite both Krishna Chalisa and Radha Chalisa?
faq.a4: Yes, Radha and Krishna are one. Radha is the Hladini Shakti (the pleasure potency) of Krishna. Reciting both completes the experience of devotion. Many devotees prefer to praise Radha Rani first, as it is a common belief that her grace makes the path to Lord Krishna accessible.
